title: Have the My Work 1000 item limit prioritized by due date
excerpt: Please change how My Work selects which of the tasks are shown by leveraging due dates versus boards that Monday arbitrarily decides are less important because they are not updated often. We have several boards with recu…

posts.author: DanielaHuber (Daniela Huber)
posts.cookedHtml: Please change how My Work selects which of the tasks are shown by leveraging due dates versus boards that Monday arbitrarily decides are less important because they are not updated often. We have several boards with recurring tasks and Monday is constantly dropping tasks that are active that we need to see. It is basically rendering the My Work page as useless. What is the point of using Monday as a project management tool if it can’t provide us the very basic need of project management of showing items that are overdue or due now.
